_comment_: MEANDER_OXBOW (resmill-only specialised preset) — single highly-sinuous channel per level, neck cutoffs deposit FFCH mud plugs in the abandoned oxbow loops, levels stack vertically as a multi-storey channel sandstone. The single-channel-per-level signature comes from the preset's stdevCHsource=1.0 (we KEEP that — do NOT override). See header of config_full_pv_shoestring.json for the comment-tag convention.

grid._comment_dx_: dx=dy=10m, dz=1m. OXBOW channels are ~55m wide -> 5-6 cells (W:D=11, depth=5m). Migration step ~3m -> 0.3 cells/event (very tight bends). 8 levels x 5m channel depth fills the 50m basin nicely.

preset._comment_: Specialised preset: single highly sinuous channel per level, neck-cutoff oxbow loops painted as FFCH mud plugs. Keeps stdevCHsource=1 (single channel) and probAvul*=0 (no avulsion).

mCHsinu._comment_: VARIED. Mean sinuosity. Preset baseline 1.5; high sinuosity is the whole signature, range covers tight to highly tortuous.

mCHwdratio._comment_: VARIED. OXBOW W:D. Narrow meander belt.

mCHdepth._comment_: VARIED. Channel depth (m). Range [3, 10] keeps deep stacks below half of z_len so several levels still fit (nlevel auto-tunes inversely).

mdistMigrate._comment_: VARIED. Migration distance per event (m). Preset baseline 3. Tight migration -> tight bends -> neck cutoffs.

mNeckFFCHprop._comment_: VARIED. Fraction of upper channel column painted as FFCH mud plug at neck-cutoff. Preset baseline 0.5 — distinctive feature of OXBOW preset.

azimuth._comment_: VARIED. Flow direction (deg, clockwise from +x). Channels are not 180-symmetric so the full circle matters.

probAvulInside._comment_: FIXED at preset baseline. Must stay 0 to keep single-channel-per-level. Varying breaks the OXBOW signature.

probAvulOutside._comment_: FIXED at preset baseline. Must stay 0 (no out-of-belt avulsion either).

mFFCHprop._comment_: FIXED at preset baseline. Mud plugs are handled by mNeckFFCHprop instead.

stdevCHsource._comment_: FIXED at preset baseline 1.0 (NOT class default 80). This is what restricts each level to a single deterministic channel — the OXBOW signature. DO NOT change.

mCSnum._comment_: splays disabled — adds visual complexity without diagnostic value; future versions can re-enable.

nlevel._comment_: AUTO. nlevel = clip(50 / mCHdepth, 2, 12). Deeper channels stack fewer levels; shallower stack more — basin always full.

level_z._comment_: skip — class default. Engine spreads 8 levels evenly across nz*dz=50m.

ntime_per_level._comment_: TRUE so every level gets its own event budget (independent of how many lower levels consumed). Without this, deep levels starve when NTGtarget=0.99 stops never firing.

stdevCHsinu._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.15 -> 0.03 (tight sinuosity distribution).

stdevCHdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.4 -> 0.3.

stdevCHwdratio._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 0.5.

stdevdistMigrate._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 10 -> 0.6 (tight migration distribution).

mLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 0.8.

stdevLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.2 -> 0.1.

stdevLVheight._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.1 -> 0.05.

mLVasym._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.3 -> 0.0 (symmetric levees).

mLVthin._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.3 -> 0.0.

Cf._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.0078 -> 0.0036.

scour_factor._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 2.0 -> 10.0.

Q._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 5.0 -> 3.256 (matches Pyrcz tutorial Showcase B hydraulics).
